channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Italy Issues Red Alert As Heatwave Hits Rome, Florence, Bologna, Brescia, And Turin
item.description: Italy's health ministry don declare red heatwave alert for Rome, Florence, Bologna, Brescia, and Turin as unusual heat dey hit parts of Europe. This na the first red alert of the year for Italy, and e...

item.title: Robert Reich argues Trump’s recent behavior and health concerns raise questions about his fitness for office
item.description: In this opinion article, former U.S. Labor Secretary and public policy professor Robert Reich argues that President Donald Trump’s recent public behavior and repeated medical visits have intensified c...

item.title: Nakuru Family Gives Late Weldon a Simple Burial Amid Poverty
item.description: In Maritim, Keswo, Nakuru county, the late Weldon was laid to rest in a humble ceremony attended by family, friends, and neighbours. The emotional event was marked by a coffin made from patched timber...

item.title: Israeli airstrikes in southern Beirut escalate tensions before Washington negotiations
item.description: On Thursday afternoon, Israel conducted an airstrike on the southern Beirut suburb of Choueifat, near the city's international airport, according to the Israeli military. The target of the attack rema...

item.title: Man dies after escaping custody vehicle near Welwyn North railway station
item.description: A man in his 40s died after being struck by a train near Welwyn North railway station in Hertfordshire following his escape from a custody transport vehicle. According to a joint statement from Hertfo...

item.title: Kubb Fanless Mini PC Updated with Intel Panther Lake CPU and Premium Pricing
item.description: French manufacturer Bleu Jour has updated its Kubb Fanless mini PC with Intel's latest Panther Lake CPU, the Core Ultra X7 358H, paired with an Arc B390 integrated GPU. The fanless design remains, uti...

item.title: Zanzibar achieves 92% immunisation coverage following Sh1.6 billion annual vaccine investment
item.description: The Revolutionary Government of Zanzibar (RGZ) has confirmed that it spends around Sh1.6 billion every year on vaccines aimed at preventing communicable and vaccine-preventable diseases, while success...

item.title: NAHCON probes tour operators for alleged breach of Hajj pilgrim allocation rules
item.description: The National Hajj Commission of Nigeria (NAHCON) has opened an investigation into some licensed tour operators over allegations that they brought in more pilgrims than the approved allocations for the...

item.title: SIU freezes pension and property linked to alleged Tembisa Hospital procurement fraud
item.description: The Special Investigating Unit (SIU) has successfully obtained a preservation order freezing the pension benefits of a former Tembisa Hospital supply chain clerk, alongside a luxury property valued at...

item.title: Study identifies GPNMB protein as a driver of Parkinson’s disease progression and a potential therapeutic target
item.description: Researchers from the Perelman School of Medicine at the University of Pennsylvania have identified a brain immune protein, GPNMB, as a key factor in the progression of Parkinson’s disease. The study s...

item.title: Pakistan and China reaffirm commitment to expanded military cooperation and strategic ties
item.description: Pakistan and China have once again reaffirmed their long-standing strategic partnership by agreeing to deepen military cooperation and strengthen defence coordination. According to a briefing by Chine...

item.title: ACT City and Environment Directorate to reduce over 100 positions amid budget constraints
item.description: The ACT government's City and Environment Directorate is planning to cut between 130 roles, representing 3 to 5 per cent of its workforce, in response to ongoing budget pressures. Director-General Dav...

item.title: Cockroach Janta Party: Online Meme Movement Struggles to Convert Digital Popularity into Real Political Impact
item.description: On 16th May 2026, the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) emerged as a satirical online political movement, sparked by a misquoted remark from Chief Justice Surya Kant about 'unemployed youth like cockroaches...

item.title: Philippines and Japan upgrade to Comprehensive Strategic Partnership, launch talks on intelligence-sharing pact
item.description: The Philippines and Japan have formally elevated their bilateral relations to a Comprehensive Strategic Partnership, marking the highest level of diplomatic ties short of a full alliance. The announce...

item.title: Ishaq Dar to visit Washington for talks with Marco Rubio on bilateral ties and regional issues
item.description: According to the Foreign Office, Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar is scheduled to visit Washington on Friday where he will hold a meeting with US Secretary of State and National Se...

item.title: WFI moves Supreme Court against Delhi High Court order permitting Vinesh Phogat in Asian Games selection trials
item.description: The Wrestling Federation of India (WFI) has approached the Supreme Court challenging a Delhi High Court order that allowed wrestler Vinesh Phogat to take part in the selection trials for the Asian Gam...

item.title: Tanzania Police Arrest Four in USD 20 Million Kidnapping and Extortion Case Involving Chinese Businessmen
item.description: Police in Dar es Salaam have arrested four Chinese nationals in connection with a serious kidnapping and extortion case involving two fellow Chinese businessmen. The suspects, identified as Fan Zhong ...

item.title: Man convicted of murdering university student after false racism claim led to victim’s wrongful arrest
item.description: A 23-year-old man, Vikrum Digwa, has been found guilty of murdering 18-year-old university student Henry Nowak following a fatal knife attack in Southampton. The court heard that Digwa used an eight-i...

item.title: Karnataka CM resignation, CBSE evaluation issues, and major legal and political developments across India
item.description: This Scroll “Rush Hour” roundup covers several significant political, administrative, and legal developments from across India. In Karnataka, senior Congress leader Siddaramaiah has resigned from the ...

item.title: Youth unemployment review warns of systemic failure and rising inactivity among young people in the UK
item.description: A government-commissioned review led by former Labour minister Alan Milburn highlights a deepening youth unemployment crisis in the UK, warning of a potential “lost generation” if urgent reforms are n...
